ot_limitation: OT evaluation not run — known limitation. Reason: OT baseline window is < 14 days (production data requirement). OT model training was incomplete due to insufficient historical depth. Resolution: accumulate ≥14 days of real OT telemetry, then re-run train → calibrate → evaluate for OT entity type.

deferred.reason: Requires a live production event stream to detect real temporal drift. The lab operates on a fixed synthetic baseline — ADWIN cannot be meaningfully applied without sequential real-world data across time windows.
Depends on CRC above. ADWIN requires a sliding-window stream of production decision scores with timestamps. Not available in the lab's static evaluation setup.

Requires an LLM integration layer to convert SHAP feature importance vectors into human-readable narrative explanations. Out of scope for the ML lab layer; belongs in the alert rendering / SOC UI layer.
